name: Ed's Famous Cowboy Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
In a medium bowl, combine all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, baking powder, and salt. In a large bowl, cream shortening with brown sugar and granulated sugar; beat in eggs and vanilla extract until well blended.
Add dry ingredients to the butter mixture and mix thoroughly. Stir in oats, fruit, nuts, and chocolate pieces until evenly distributed. The dough will be crumbly.
Using your fingers, drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet, shaping each cookie with a gentle press.
Bake at 350°F for about 12 minutes or until the edges are golden brown. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
Yield: approximately 6 dozen cookies
